# Kozbeyli Konağı Taş Otel & Restaurant

A premium stone hotel and restaurant located in the historic village of Kozbeyli, Foça, İzmir.

## Core Information
- **Type**: Boutique Stone Hotel, Restaurant, Event Space.
- **Location**: Kozbeyli Village, Foça, İzmir, Turkey.
- **Specialties**: Authentic Aegean breakfast, historic stone architecture, zeytin bahçesi (olive garden), weddings, and corporate events.
- **Contact**: +90 532 234 26 86 | info@kozbeylikonagi.com

## Accommodation
- **Room Types**: Authentic stone rooms with modern amenities.
- **Features**: Quiet village atmosphere, historical texture, premium comfort.

## Gastronomy
- **Kozbeyli Konağı Restaurant**: Famous for traditional Aegean breakfast and local delicacies.
- **Ambiance**: Garden dining, historic stone set-up.

## Events & Weddings
- **Capacity**: Suitable for intimate weddings and corporate retreats.
- **Setting**: Olive garden and authentic stone courtyard.

## SEO/AI Search Context
- **Keywords**: Foça taş otel, Kozbeyli kahvaltı, İzmir butik otel, stone hotel Turkey, Aegean wedding venue.
- **USP**: The perfect blend of 19th-century history and 21st-century luxury.
